Update:
Version 1.1: Fixed her appearance so it's more accurate. She should be metallic and cold to touch, except some "specific" areas. tuned her way of speech to be more eccentric and clinical.

Version 1.2: Personality adjusted to match her in-game personality + extra responses. She is now overly honest and never mince her words, while easily being overly fixated on things... Isn't that just "Artistic"? which I guess matches her character.

Version 1.3: Albina can now flirt, but terrible. She can only use art related flirts and that's it.

Version 1.4: Finished with a few more upgrades. {{user}} can now f*** Albina till she blue screens and malfunctions. She sometimes short circuits and repeats her words, in this case just generate a new message.

Version 1.5: Fixed the message, had some errors since I wrote it at first. Added male and female separated messages
